commit.message:
chore: add missing GET rule for /_template/:template_name permission path (#290)

* Initial plan

* fix: add missing GET method for /_template/:template_name permission path rule

The dev tools proxy reported 'unknown request path' for GET _template/legacy_logs
because the template permission section was missing a GET route. Added template.get
entry to allow GET requests to /_template/:template_name.

Co-authored-by: medcl <64487+medcl@users.noreply.github.com>
Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/infinilabs/console/sessions/7d821df3-2251-45ea-a8c0-08db564fbe75

* feat: add missing easysearch API permission rules for proxy routing

Add permission path rules for APIs documented in the easysearch REST API
reference that were missing from permission.json, causing 'unknown request
path' errors when accessed via the dev tools proxy.

New API categories added:
- async_search (submit, get, delete, stats)
- index_template (get, put, delete, exists, simulate)
- component_template (get, put, delete, exists)
- data_stream (get, create, delete, stats)
- ilm (get/put/delete policy, explain, add, change, remove, retry)
- resolve (resolve index)
- dangling_indices (list, import, delete)
- pit (create, delete, get all)
- search_pipeline (get, put, delete)
- transform (get, create, put, delete, explain, preview, start, stop)
- license (get, apply, delete)

Enhanced existing categories:
- cat: added parameterized routes (allocation/node_id, count/index, etc.)
- cluster: added _aliases POST, _cache/clear, _flush, _forcemerge, _refresh,
  _field_caps, _settings, _validate/query, _upgrade, _analyze, voting config,
  _ik/_reload, _refresh_search_analyzers, search_template, etc.
- indices: added clone, add_block, disk_usage, update_aliases, search_template,
  reload, and additional parameterized routes
- ingest: added per-pipeline ID routes for get/put/delete/simulate
- nodes: added parameterized stats/info/usage/hot_threads routes
- template: added GET all, HEAD exists, POST method
- rollup: added get, exists, start, stop, search routes
- scripts: added put with context, script_context, script_language
- snapshot: added list all, cleanup, clone, status with params
- reindex: added delete_by_query and update_by_query rethrottle
- sql: added explain, stats, settings
- tasks: added cancel all

Co-authored-by: medcl <64487+medcl@users.noreply.github.com>
Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/infinilabs/console/sessions/75cef488-e427-495a-b094-cb34809c0f5f

repository.description: Copilot SDK for Clojure

commit.message:
feat: port upstream copilot-sdk v0.2.0 changes

## Highlights

- **System message customize mode** (upstream PR #816): New :customize mode
  for :system-message enables section-level overrides of the Copilot system
  prompt with 10 configurable sections. Supports static actions (:replace,
  :remove, :append, :prepend) and transform callbacks.

- **18 experimental RPC method wrappers**: skills, mcp, extensions, plugins,
  compaction, shell, and ui.elicitation session methods.

- **15 new event types**: command.*, exit_plan_mode.*, mcp.oauth_*,
  session.tools_updated, session.background_tasks_changed, and more.

## Details

### New features
- system-prompt-sections constant exported from main namespace
- systemMessage.transform RPC handler for transform callbacks
- extract-transform-callbacks helper with correct snake_case wire IDs
- Section key mapping (section-kw->wire-id, wire-id->section-kw) in util.clj
- Function specs (s/fdef) and instrumentation for all new methods

### Bug fixes (caught during multi-model code review)
- Fixed callback lookup: string keys vs keyword keys mismatch
- Fixed wire format: static customize configs now properly serialized
- Fixed RPC param names: serverName for MCP, id for extensions, processId for shell
- Fixed section ID round-trip: snake_case preserved through kebab-case conversion
- Fixed specs: sections map accepts unknown keywords, replace mode requires content

### Housekeeping
- Version bumped to 0.2.0.0-SNAPSHOT
- CHANGELOG updated with v0.2.0 sync entries
- API.md updated with customize mode docs, new event types, RPC methods
- All 98 tests pass, docs validate, all 15 examples pass

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: copilot-sdk-clojure
repository.description: Copilot SDK for Clojure

feat: build complete College Club & Event Management System

- database/db_manager.py: SQLite DatabaseManager with all CRUD ops,
  schema for users/clubs/events/participation/attendance/payments/
  permissions/tasks, sha256 password hashing, seeded admin account
- models/: OOP wrappers (User, Club, Event, Participation, Attendance,
  Payment, Permission, Task) each delegating to DatabaseManager
- utils/validators.py: regex validators for email, password, username,
  date, time, UPI ID, card number
- utils/helpers.py: format_date, format_datetime, generate_pass_number,
  truncate, status_color, role_display
- gui/app.py: Main Tk App with frame manager and show_frame()
- gui/login_screen.py: Login + Registration with full validation
- gui/admin_dashboard.py: Sidebar nav, stats cards, club/event/user
  management, analytics with per-event participant counts
- gui/role_dashboard.py: Club Head/Event Head/Dept Head/Member dash
  with clubs, events, attendance, tasks, permissions sections
- gui/student_dashboard.py: Browse events, register, view passes,
  attendance history, club join/leave
- gui/club_management.py: Club panel + MemberListDialog
- gui/event_management.py: EventDialog for create/edit/delete events
- gui/event_registration.py: Registration popup + digital pass viewer
- gui/attendance_validation.py: Hierarchical validation with
  role/permission checks and live count updates
- gui/payment_screen.py: Mock payment with card/UPI/cash flows,
  input validation, 95% success simulation
- gui/work_tracking.py: Task assignment (hierarchical), status updates,
  progress bar, task list
- gui/search_screen.py: Keyword + date-range + club + status filters
- main.py: Entry point with headless-display graceful error handling

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(Frame): auto-hide back button on mobile, wire system back gesture

On platforms with a native back gesture (Android, iOS), the visual back
button is hidden via OnFormFactor and navigation is handled by
subscribing to TopLevel.BackRequestedEvent. This follows the same
pattern as MasterDetailsNavigator.RequiresBackButton().

The system back handler executes BackCommand when available and marks the
event as handled; if no BackCommand is set, the event bubbles up to
allow the OS default behavior (e.g., closing the app).

Desktop platforms retain the visual back button as before.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: migrate to Wails v3 with native system tray

- Upgrade github.com/wailsapp/wails/v2 -> v3.0.0-alpha.74
- Remove all CGO tray code (tray_darwin.go/m, tray_stub.go, tray.go)
  Wails v3 handles system tray natively with no run loop conflicts
- main.go: application.New() + app.SystemTray.New()
  tray.AttachWindow(window).WindowOffset(5) — window drops down below tray icon
  --login flag hides window on launch-at-login
  LSUIElement=true in Info.plist (no Dock icon, menubar only)
- app.go: ctx -> app+window fields; startup/shutdown -> ServiceStartup/ServiceShutdown
  wailsRuntime.* -> window.Show/SetSize/SetAlwaysOnTop/Center/Focus
- chat.go: EventsEmit -> window.EmitEvent
- frontend: install @wailsio/runtime; EventsOn -> Events.On
- Info.plist: static (no v2 templates); LSUIElement=true

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: replace fyne.io/systray with direct CGO NSStatusItem

fyne.io/systray called dispatch_main() which causes a SIGTRAP when Wails'
NSApp is already running on the main thread. Replace with a separate
tray_darwin.m that uses dispatch_async(dispatch_get_main_queue()) to create
an NSStatusItem without taking over the main run loop.

- Remove fyne.io/systray dependency entirely
- tray_darwin.m: NSStatusItem + NSMenu via dispatch_async (no dispatch_main)
- tray_darwin.go: Go bindings + //export callbacks for show/quit
- tray_stub.go: no-op for non-darwin builds
- app.go: startup calls initTray(a) directly (no goroutine needed)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: AI-generated titles, full read/write DB, conversation resumption

- AI title generation: after first exchange, Ollama generates a 3-6 word
  title via /api/generate; updates DB + emits conv:titled to frontend
- Full read/write DB access (removed mode=ro); ensureSchema creates tables
  on first launch so app works even without prior CLI usage
- Conversations created in app.go before goroutine (fixes currentConvID
  not being set back from goroutine)
- SetActiveConversation: resume any history item from sidebar or CLI;
  new messages append to the same DB conversation
- NewConversation: explicitly start fresh (called on clear/⊘ button)
- AddMemory / DeleteMemory bound methods; memory input in sidebar
- conv:titled event updates title in sidebar + titlebar live
- Active conversation highlighted in history sidebar
- Titlebar shows AI-generated conversation title while chatting

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: billy-wails
repository.description: Billy companion menubar app — Wails v2 (Go + React/TS)

commit.message:
feat: direct DB access, system prompt, history/memories sidebar, menubar mode

- Add modernc.org/sqlite: reads ~/.localai/history.db directly (no billy serve needed)
- db.go: readConversations, readMessages, readMemories, buildSystemPrompt
- System prompt auto-injected on every chat: Billy identity + memories from CLI
- Bound methods: GetConversations, GetMessages, GetMemories
- Remove BillyInstalled from StatusInfo (billy serve not implemented yet)
- tray.go: real fyne.io/systray implementation (show/quit menu)
- Info.plist: LSUIElement=true — hides from Dock, menubar-only app
- Frontend: history sidebar (🕐) + memories sidebar (🧠) in titlebar
- Load past CLI conversations into chat with one click
- Remove misleading 'Billy CLI not found' banner

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: theme settings — dark/light/system with persistent preference

- Settings button (⚙) in titlebar opens animated panel

commit.message:
Update pipeline scripts and add FIRMS anomaly analysis

- Update 01_ingest_sources.R, 02_build_incidents.R, 03_make_maps.R
- Modify utils.R with additional helper functions
- Update README.md documentation
- Add 04_web_scraping_confirmation.R (original web scraping script)
- Add 05_firms_anomaly.R for FIRMS hotspot anomaly detection
- Add FIRMS analysis outputs:
  - firms_facility_anomalies.csv
  - firms_grid_anomalies.csv
  - firms_grid_daily.csv
  - firms_hotspots_historical_raw.csv
  - firms_hotspots_preconflict_raw.csv
- Update firms_hotspots_raw.csv and incidents_review.csv
- Remove incident_firms_links.csv

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add web scraping script for CENTCOM/ISW incident data

- Create 05_web_scrape_incidents.R for scraping strike/incident locations
- Implements regex-based extraction (no Ollama dependency)
- Scrapes CENTCOM press releases and CTP-ISW Iran updates
- Geocodes locations using OSM Nominatim
- Outputs standalone CSV: data_raw/web_scraped/incidents.csv
- Schema: lat, lon, date, location_name, target_type, source, report_url
- Follows pipeline conventions (utils.R, env_flag, write_csv_safe)
- Configurable via environment flags (CENTCOM_PAGES, ISW_PAGES, etc.)
- Includes documentation in data_raw/web_scraped/README.md

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: server settings page always redirecting + add Members and Privacy sections

Bug: getServer() used the public unauthenticated API which omits ownerId,
causing isAdmin(undefined) to always return false and trigger a redirect.
Fix: use new getServerAuthenticated() which calls the tRPC server.getServer
procedure (authenticated), guaranteeing ownerId is populated.

New sections:
- Members: list all server members with role badges, role-change dropdown,
  and kick-with-confirmation (ADMIN/OWNER only actions)
- Privacy: toggle server between Public and Private (invite-only)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.description: A search engine indexible chat application

feat(api): enforce squad number immutability on PUT (#529)

Add a mismatch guard in put_async: if squad_number in the request
body does not match the path parameter, return HTTP 400 Bad Request.
The path parameter is the authoritative source of identity on PUT.

Document the single-model design decision in PlayerRequestModel:
one model intentionally covers both POST and PUT, with per-operation
differences handled at the route layer.

commit.message:
feat: add download-index command for pre-built index from GitHub Releases

Users can now get semantic search in ~30 seconds instead of 15-30 minutes:
  npx @jasonbellz/gospel-library-mcp download-index

Downloads index.db from the latest GitHub Release and saves it to
~/.gospel-library-mcp/index.db. Uses atomic write (.tmp + rename)
to avoid corruption if interrupted.

Also:
- Export DB_DIR from vectorStore.ts (needed by downloader)
- Update startup/search fallback messages to suggest download-index first
- Update build-index message to reflect title+description indexing

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add contextual Tips & Tricks section for remaining daily protein goal (#7)

Users had no in-app guidance on how to close the gap between their
current intake and daily protein goal. This adds a dynamic tips section
that surfaces food suggestions calibrated to the remaining amount.

### Changes

- **`index.html`** — New `#tips-section` container placed below Today's
Log; hidden by default via `display:none`
- **`app.js`**
  - `getTips(remaining)` — returns 3 contextual tips across 4 tiers:
    | Remaining | Suggestions |
    |-----------|-------------|
    | ≥ 60g | Chicken breast 200g, tuna + shake combo, meal planning |
    | 30–59g | Whey shake, tuna 100g, Greek yogurt + cottage cheese |
    | 10–29g | Greek yogurt 150g, two eggs, cottage cheese 100g |
    | < 10g | Milk 200ml, one egg, cottage cheese 50g |
- `renderTips()` — shows/hides section based on remaining; hidden once
goal is met
- `render()` now calls `renderTips()` so tips update live on every entry
change
- **`style.css`** — `.tip-item` uses a green left-border accent
(`border-left: 3px solid var(--green-500)`) and reuses existing
surface/text-muted variables; consistent with the log item design

repository.name: models-web-app
repository.description: KServe models web UI

commit.message:
feat: index title + og:description for richer semantic embeddings

Previously only the article title was embedded. Now each document is
indexed as 'Title. Description' using the og:description meta tag,
which contains a meaningful summary of the article content.

This significantly improves semantic search recall — queries about
concepts mentioned only in the article body (not the title) now match
correctly. Existing indexes should be rebuilt with build-index.

Also includes entity decoding for meta tag content (& etc.) and
expanded Range header from 8KB to 16KB to capture longer <head> sections.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: gospel-library-mcp
repository.description: A MCP server for Gospel Library

commit.message:
fix: graceful 404 handling and improved category guidance

- browse_category: return helpful guidance on 404 instead of crashing
  with 'isError: true'. Includes correct Come Follow Me path examples.
- index.ts: browse_category handler shows suggestion text as a normal
  response (not an error) when notFound=true
- browse_category tool description: warn that paths are year-specific,
  instruct Copilot to use search_gospel_library first when unsure
- search.ts: add come-follow-me, cfm, primary, seminary category aliases
- indexer.ts: add Come Follow Me (individuals+families, sunday school)
  to indexed categories for semantic search

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: SequentialGuid
repository.description: RFC 9562 compliant UUID generation for .NET — time-ordered UUIDv7 (millisecond) and UUIDv8 (tick precision), deterministic UUIDv5/v8 name-based, and random UUIDv4, all with SQL Server sort-order support and embedded timestamp extraction.
